passages.passage_text:
Directions (Q. Nos. 44-47) In the following questions, answers are based on the diagram given below

I. The rectangle represents Government employees
II. The triangle represents urban people
III. The circle represents graduates
IV. The square represents clerks

Directions (Q. Nos. 48-49) In the following diagram represents a group of persons. The triangle represents educated persons, the rectangle represents the administrative persons, the square represents the businessman and the circle represents income tax payers.

Directions (Q. Nos. 51-55) In the following diagram, the circle stands for insurance agents, the square stands for hard working, the triangle stands for rural people and the rectangle stands for graduates. Study the diagram carefully and answer the questions that follow.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The diagram shows the survey on a sample of 1000 persons with reference to their knowledge of English, Hindi and Marathi. 105 people know ... languages.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following statements is true?

choices.b: Some Government employees are graduates as well as clerks
choices.d: All clerks are Governments employees but not graduates

choices.b: no clerk is from urban areas
choices.c: all graduates are from urban areas

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following numbers represents urban Government employees, who are graduate but not clerk?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which number represents clerks, who are Government employees but are neither graduates nor live in urban areas?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: From the above figure, it can be concluded that

choices.b: some administrative persons are income tax payers
choices.c: all income tax payers are educated
choices.d: educated persons which are not in administrative service do not pay income tax

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: According to the given figure, it can be inferred that

choices.a: none of the income tax payer is educated
choices.b: all the administrative persons are income tax payers
choices.c: none of the income tax payer is administrative person
choices.d: some of the persons who are neither businessman nor income tax payers are educated persons

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: In the diagram given below, the circle represents young persons, the triangle represents uneducated persons and the rectangle represents employed persons. Which number represents young, uneducated and unemployed persons?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Non-rural and hard working insurance agents who are graduates are indicated by the region

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Insurance agents who are neither graduates nor hard working but rural are represented by the region
